portalVideo.prompt: Cinematic photorealistic 3D branding animation on pitch-black seamless studio void (#060608). ACT ONE — EARTH FIRST (seconds 0–3): open on an extreme close-up of planet Earth filling the frame — deep blue oceans, crisp continents, majestic slow rotation, no other objects visible. ACT TWO — SLOW PULLBACK (seconds 3–7): camera smoothly and slowly zooms out and retreats backward, Earth shrinks to center frame, revealing space around it. ACT THREE — INFINITY REVEAL (seconds 7–12): as pullback completes, a massive three-dimensional infinity loop (∞) materializes and encircles the globe — not solid metal but a perpetual electric energy stream: liquid silver light and pulsing cyan-blue particles rushing through the loop at high velocity, volumetric glow, roaring electric current. When the stream passes the globe, subtle arcing electricity, fine data lines, and glowing network nodes pulse across continents. Final wide composition holds steady: Earth rotates, energy cycles through the infinity loop continuously. Design for seamless repeat: last frame matches first frame closely enough to loop forever. No text, no letters, no logos, no company names, no watermark, no UI, no people. Premium fintech cinematic studio lighting, dramatic chrome reflections, ultra sharp, mesmerizing.

backgroundVideo.prompt: Cinematic abstract background loop for a premium fintech tourism website. Deep anthracite black base (#060608), subtle liquid metal chrome reflections, soft cyan and electric blue light ribbons flowing slowly left to right, faint purple ambient glow at edges, ultra minimal, no text, no logos, no people, no buildings, no QR patterns, no UI elements. Macro lens feel, shallow depth of field, silky smooth motion, seamless loop, dark luxury aesthetic like high-end payment app, photorealistic lighting but abstract, calm and elegant, not flashy neon disco.
